headline: The Charles Schwab Corporation announced the successful closing of its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings, Inc.
investor_impact: The completion of the Forge Global acquisition officially expands Schwab's footprint into the private market and pre-IPO securities space. This strategic move is expected to enhance Schwab's product offerings for high-net-worth clients and create new revenue synergies, though integration execution and accretion metrics will be key focus areas for investors.
